blocks.text: Match preview: San Francisco Unicorns face TBC in Challenger (Loser of Q v Winner of E) (T20) on Fri, 17 Jul, 2026, 7:00 am at Oakland Coliseum Oakland. Full pitch report, weather forecast, and squad details below.
Standard T20 surface expected. Conditions will be clearer at the toss — monitor team selection and dew factor for night games.
Expected par score: 160–180 runs par score.
Overcast · High 20°C / Low 12°C · Rain: 0 mm · Wind: up to 17 km/h. Cloud cover expected — seamers may get movement with the new ball.
International playing XI is announced at the toss. Check back on match day for confirmed line-ups.
